gate1_data_qa.check: phone/email valid + service/geo fit + no outreach duplicate <7d

gate2_message_qa.check: business token, service script, channel-safe wording

gate3_throughput_qa.check: send windows normalized per lead timezone

gate4_manual_unlock.check: human go/no-go before each send window

followup_policy.definition: fu1 swap-channel, fu2 call+vm|nudge, fu3 breakup CTA SITE

lead_schedule.defer_reason: manual gate lock active; do not auto-send
